{{Quote|Don't let them grab hold of you, or you're done for.|Teerik, on Mantellian Savrips|<ref name="Rendezvous at Ord Mantell">{{GamerCite|1|Rendezvous at Ord Mantell}}</ref>}}
'''Teerik''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] [[Mantellian Savrip/Legends|savrip]] [[Hunting/Legends|hunter]] on [[Ord Mantell/Legends|Ord Mantell]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==Biography==

While hunting on Ord Mantell, Teerik—whose name meant "Spiritual" in his native [[Rodese/Legends|Rodese]]—assisted [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] recruiter [[Renci Tosh]] in fighting a deadly [[Mantellian Savrip/Legends|Mantellian Savrip]]. He and Renci also ran afoul of [[Yarroq]], a [[Trandoshan/Legends|Trandoshan]] leader of a band of raiders who had made off with Renci's crash-landed [[Z-95 Headhunter/Legends|Z-95 Headhunter]] in an attempt to sell it for scrap.<ref name="CG1" />
